title: Shredded Tissue Paper - Vaktop Yellow Shredded Paper, 100g Raffia Gift Filler Paper for Easter Gift Box Filling, Basket Filler, Hampers Packaging Decorations, Party Supplies Box Stuffing
features: 【SOFT SHREDDED PAPER】The shredded tissue paper is made of paper, soft and safe to use. Our raffia gift filler paper is recyclable and you can use them for many times.
【YELLOW SHREDDED TISSUE PAPER】Package includes 100g/3.5oz yellow shredded tissue paper. The raffia gift filler paper is a great solution for vibrant packing decoration!

【MAKE GIFT MORE PRESENTED】Fill the gift box with shredded tissue paper, which can make your gift boxes and gifts look more classy and well presented. Also, it could provide some breakage protection for fragile items, helping you pack items more easily.
【LIGHTWEIGHT】The raffia gift filler paper is lightweight, easy for you to carry. We use compression packaging, tear to open the packaging, repeatedly rubbing the shredded paper can make them fluffy.

【WIDE USAGE】These raffia paper shreds are perfect for filling gift boxes, bags and hampers, adding charm to them. Suitable for various occasions such as Easter, birthdays, anniversaries, weddings and so on.
